Suspect.follow_up: Review within 24-48 hours, consider additional tests

Pathological.follow_up: Urgent obstetric consultation, prepare for potential intervention

prospective_study.title: Prospective Validation of FetalyzeAI for Fetal Health Classification
objectives: Validate FetalyzeAI performance in real-time clinical setting
Compare AI-assisted vs standard care outcomes
prospective_study.ethical_approval: IRB approval required from all participating centers

model_training.description: XGBoost classifier trained on UCI CTG dataset

uncertainty_computation.description: Prediction entropy computed from class probabilities
uncertainty_computation.formula: H = -sum(p * log(p)) for each class probability p

calibration_curves.description: Reliability diagrams computed using sklearn calibration_curve

multi_dataset_validation.description: Simulated external validation by adding Gaussian noise to features
multi_dataset_validation.note: For ISEF, recommend validating on actual external datasets

cost_benefit_analysis.description: Economic impact estimation based on medical literature
cost_benefit_analysis.assumptions: Conservative estimates based on published data

prospective_study.description: Proposed RCT design following CONSORT guidelines

fetalyze_v3.name: TOPQUA (TOPological-QUantum-Adaptive) Neural Architecture
components: Quantum Fourier Coupling Layer — 3 frequency scales + cross-feature Fourier interference terms (quantum entanglement analogue between CTG features)
Topological Persistence Layer — 5 TDA-inspired features: local density (Betti-0), ring score (Betti-1), persistence entropy, filtration slope, Ollivier-Ricci curvature
KAN-Inspired B-Spline Projection — learnable Gaussian-bump basis (6 knots), replaces fixed GELU projection with adaptive spline decomposition
Riemannian Metric Attention — 4-head attention with learnable Cholesky metric G=LLᵀ, attention score (LQ)(LK)ᵀ/√d in curved feature space
Gated Attention Residual — sigmoid gate controls blend of Euclidean and Riemannian representations
Deep Residual Network — 512→256→128→64→32→3 with skip connections at every block
Lyapunov Stability Regularization — gradient-norm penalty (λ=0.05) enforces local dynamical stability
Triple Ensemble — 50% TOPQUA Neural Net + 35% XGBoost (400 trees, depth 8) + 15% KAN-Net
topological_features: ricci_proxy (Ollivier-Ricci curvature — manifold curvature at each point)
novelty_claims: First CTG model to use topological persistence features (TDA-inspired geometry)
First application of Riemannian metric attention to fetal health classification
First KAN-inspired spline activation network for CTG analysis
First Lyapunov stability regularization for clinical fetal monitoring AI
Novel Quantum Fourier Coupling: cross-feature interference terms (quantum entanglement analogue)
First triple-ensemble combining TOPQUA-NN + XGBoost + KAN-Net for CTG
